title: A 'Can't-Lose' Land Deal
scenario: A relative pitches a plot of land in a far-off area that will 'surely triple in value'. It would take your entire savings plus a loan. Do you go for it?

choices.label: Put everything into the plot
choices.lesson: Illiquid, single-bet 'sure things' are risky: you can't easily sell, the money is locked, and 'guaranteed' returns rarely are. Never bet your whole safety net.

choices.label: Pass and keep diversifying
choices.lesson: Diversified, liquid investments beat a single illiquid gamble for most young earners. Keep money flexible while you're still building.
